name: Puzzle Game
description: Grid-based puzzle game framework with drag-and-drop or click-to-swap piece mechanics. Includes a puzzle manager that handles board state, win detection, shuffle, hints, and level progression. Suitable for match-3, sliding puzzles, jigsaw-style games, and tile-based logic puzzles.
features: Multiple interaction modes: click-swap, drag-drop, slide
Win condition checking with customizable rules

grid_columns.description: Number of columns in the puzzle grid

grid_rows.description: Number of rows in the puzzle grid

cell_size.description: Size of each grid cell in pixels

match_count.description: Minimum pieces in a row to count as a match

time_limit.description: Time limit in seconds (0 = no limit)
